## Validation

- [ ] `lint` passed
- [ ] `typecheck` passed
- [ ] `test` passed
- [ ] `test:a11y` passed
- [ ] `test:responsive` passed

## Responsive Checklist

- [ ] Verified at `320px`
- [ ] Verified at `768px`
- [ ] Verified at `1280px`
- [ ] Core flows do not require horizontal scrolling

## Accessibility Checklist

- [ ] Keyboard navigation works for affected UI
- [ ] Focus states are visible and consistent
- [ ] Form controls have labels/accessible names
- [ ] Icon-only controls have accessible labels
- [ ] No color-only status communication in affected UI

## Usability Checklist

- [ ] Loading states are present for async actions
- [ ] Error states are actionable
- [ ] Empty states guide next user action
- [ ] Destructive actions require confirmation

## Security and Data Access

- [ ] No unintended data exposure introduced
- [ ] RLS impact reviewed for affected queries/mutations
- [ ] Authorization paths include negative-case validation
